title: モンスターストライク
subTitle: Role Playing/Puzzle Role-playing/Physics-puzzle RPG
desc:
◆Congratulations: Over 50 million domestic users! /TV commercial is now airing! ◆
[Game introduction]
"Hipari Hunting RPG" that up to 4 people can enjoy at the same time on smartphones and tablets!
Become a monster master and collect a lot of monsters with various abilities!
More than 1000 unique monsters are waiting for you!
▼The rules are simple
Just pull the monster and hit the enemy!
If you hit an ally monster, a friendship combo will be activated!
Even monsters with seemingly weak attack power may display surprising power when a combo is activated!
▼Decide the strike shot!
Once the turn of the battle has passed, you can use the special move "Strike Shot"!
The techniques vary depending on the monster, do you tend to use them right away? Do you want to wait until the boss?
Is the timing of use the difference between life and death?
▼Collect, grow and become stronger!
Combine and raise monsters obtained through battles and gachas!
In order to evolve strongly, you will need evolution materials other than monsters.
Raise strong monsters and create your own strongest team!
▼A monster from another world descends from the sky!
The boss doesn't always appear at the end of the stage!
Always be ready for battle at all times!
▼ Defeat powerful enemies with your friends!
You can play with up to 4 friends at the same time!
You can take on the quest with just one person's stamina!
Even strong enemies that cannot be defeated by one person may be defeated if everyone works together!
There are also plenty of rare quests exclusive to multiplayer!
Defeat rare monsters and get them!
+++ [Price] +++
App itself: Free
*Some paid items may apply.
+++ [Required environment] +++
Android7.0 or higher
(Unable to operate on Android below 7.0)
*Even if the device meets the required environment, it may not work properly depending on the device's performance, specifications, device-specific application usage, etc.
Please check the URL below for details.
https://www.monster-strike.com/help/answer08/#help_0800
+++ [About the handling of personal information] +++
Monster Strike allows you to send SMS invitations from your phonebook as a way to more easily connect with friends.
Rest assured that your phone number will not be used for any purpose other than inviting you.

Please refer to the "Application License Agreement" before use.
Please be sure to check the displayed terms of use before using.
